author: hollowstrawberry
description: Connects to OpenAI to generate images, with an /imagine slash command and a Remix app command. Requires an api key and ongoing monetary cost per image (depending on settings, may be fractions of a cent or fractions of a dollar). Configurable hourly quota per user, with an option to add a VIP role and specific VIP users that can generate as much as they want.
install_msg:
🖼 __**GPT Image**__
:warning: **Important:** OpenAI's models cost money every time they are used. Please check [the docs](<https://developers.openai.com/api/docs/guides/image-generation#calculating-costs>) for prices and use this cog with care. (As of writing, GPT Image 2 costs ~0.5 cents in low quality, and 16+ cents in high quality, slightly higher for image editing)
```Cog installed. Instructions:
1. Load it with [p]load gptimage
2. Add your OpenAI API key with [p]set api openai api_key,INSERT_API_KEY
3. Enable the /imagine slash command and the Remix app command with [p]slash enablecog gptimage
4. Sync slash commands with [p]slash sync
5. You may need to restart Discord to see the new commands.
5. The bot owner can enable image generation in specific guilds and manage quotas, with the [p]gptimage command.
6. Enjoy!```
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not store user data.
